# v2.0.8

## Changes

- Added `[gitlab].api_timeout_seconds` and `[gitlab].archive_timeout_seconds`.
- Repository archive downloads now use the archive-specific timeout, so large repositories can extend archive download time without changing regular GitLab API request timeouts.
- Updated the example config and README files with archive timeout guidance.

## Assets

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.8-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.8-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
